ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature setting for the simulation */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to maps table */,
  "simulations" INTEGER /* Number of simulations run */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., normal, discounted) */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Return value for the simulation */,
  "discounted_return" REAL /* Discounted return value for the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the map */,
  "map_config" TEXT /* Map configuration (list of strings) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the map */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the map was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_history_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, trend) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis (text) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Discounted return value for the simulation

ID of the user who created the map
